scripts.build: npm_config_production=false npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix client && npm_config_production=false npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm_config_production=false npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm_config_production=false npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps
